tsb-reminder-title-generic: Dhammaystir hordhacaaga si aad u noqoto turjubaan
tsb-reminder-content-generic:
Salaan $1,

Waad ku mahadsan tahay inaad iska diiwaangelisay {{SITENAME}}.

Haddii aad dhammaystirto tarjumaadaha tijaabada ah, maamulayaashu waxay ku siin doonaan gelitaan buuxa oo tarjumaad ah wax yar ka dib.

Fadlan halkan kaalay oo samee tarjumaado dheeraad ah:
$2

$3,
Shaqaalaha {{SITENAME}}
tsb-reminder-sent: {{PLURAL:$1|Waxaa la diray $1 xusuusin. Waqtiga: $2.|Waxaa la diray $1 xusuusinood. Waqtiga xusuusintii ugu dambeysay: $2.}}
tsb-email-promoted-subject: Hadda waxaad tahay turjubaan ka tirsan {{SITENAME}}
tsb-email-promoted-body:
Salaan {{GENDER:$1|$1}},

Hambalyo! Waxaan hubiyay tarjumaadaha tijaabada ah ee aad ku samaysay {{SITENAME}}, waxaanan ku siiyay xuquuq buuxda oo turjubaanimo.

Kaalay {{SITENAME}} si aad hadda iyo maalin kasta u sii waddo tarjumaadda:
$2

Soo dhawoow, waadna ku mahadsan tahay wax ku biirintaada!

{{GENDER:$3|$3}},
Shaqaalaha {{SITENAME}}
tsb-email-rejected-subject: Codsigaaga aad ku doonaysay inaad turjubaan ka noqoto {{SITENAME}} waa la diiday
tsb-email-rejected-body:
Salaan {{GENDER:$1|$1}},

Waad ku mahadsan tahay codsigaaga aad ku doonaysay inaad turjubaan ka noqoto {{SITENAME}}. Waxaan ka xumahay inaan kuu sheego in aan diiday codsigaaga, sababtoo ah tayada tarjumaadahaaga ma aysan buuxin shuruudaha.

Haddii aad u malaynayso in codsigaaga si qalad ah loo diiday, fadlan isku day inaad mar kale codsato inaad turjubaan ka noqoto {{SITENAME}}. Waxaad iska diiwaangelin kartaa halkan:
$2

{{GENDER:$3|$3}},
Shaqaalaha {{SITENAME}}
tsb-selected-count: {{PLURAL:$1|$1 isticmaale ayaa la doortay|$1 isticmaaleyaal ayaa la doortay}}
tsb-didnt-make-any-translations: Isticmaalahan ma uusan samayn wax tarjumaado ah.
tsb-delete-userpage-summary: Tirtiridda bogga isticmaalaha ee isticmaalaha bacaadka
translate-translationstash-welcome: Soo dhawoow {{GENDER:$1|$1}}, waxaad tahay turjubaan cusub
translate-translationstash-welcome-note: Baro isticmaalka qalabka turjumaadda. Turjun fariimo qaar, kuna guulayso xuquuqda turjubaanka oo dhamaystiran si aad uga qaybqaadato mashaariicda aad jeceshahay.
tsb-limit-reached-body:
Waxaad gaartay xadka turjumaadda ee turjubaannada cusub.
Kooxdayadu waxay dhawaan xaqiijin doonaan oo kor u qaadi doonaan akoonkaaga.
Markaa ka dib, waxaad awoodi doontaa inaad turjunto xaddid la'aan.
tsb-no-requests-from-new-users: Ma jiraan codsiyo ka yimid isticmaale cusub
tsb-create-user-page: Abuuray bogga isticmaalaha ee aasaasiga ah
logentry-translatorsandbox-rejected: $1 {{GENDER:$2|la diiday}} codsigii ahaa "$3" in uu noqdo turjubaan
logentry-newusers-tsbpromoted: Akoonka isticmaalaha $3 waxaa {{GENDER:$2|la abuuray}} iyadoo laga dalacsiiyay bacaadka
tsb-other-actions: Waxaad u baahan tahay inaad [[Special:TranslationStash|gud biso qaar ka mid ah tarjumaadaha tijaabada ah]] oo la ansixiyo ka hor intaadan wax ka beddelin.
